base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_shooting_idle_walk — a character (playable) from 1986 metroid. adds arm-recoil frame. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 3-frame variant of idle/walk while firing — adds arm-recoil frame
